name: display-invariants
description: Display-sweep W4 frozen invariants run against the PRODUCTION BUNDLE served on the deployed-web leg (vite preview, dist/) — the first time these frozen display contracts (ADR-0038 rendered==junction-position + FadeState table across a context walk, junction persona == activeJunction perf-write equivalence, reset-protocol control) run against the minified production build in a browser. PRECONDITION: `npm run build` first. Run: canary run --workload qualia-web --suite display-invariants --headless.
